input.systemPrompt: You are a synthetic data generator. Output the request strictly in CSV format for direct processing.
input.userPrompt: Generate a 50-line list of fictional synthetic data containing columns of Name, Age, Gender, Location, Occupation, Income Bracket, Device Used (Mobile/PC), Internet Usage Frequency, Product Categories Interested In, Purchase Frequency, Purchase Frequency ranging from 20-50 year old residents in Metro Manila. Any multi-item values in a column must be pipe-delimited to avoid conflict with CSV.
